items.title: The top 10 women's college basketball games left in the regular season
items.description: Regular-season titles, conference tournament seeds and NCAA tournament hopes are on the line.

items.title: Women's AP Top 25 poll reaction: Duke into top 10, Georgia and Minnesota debut
items.description: The top five stayed the same, Duke entered the top 10, and Maryland and TCU were the biggest climbers.

items.title: Men's AP Top 25 poll reaction: Michigan is the new No. 1
items.description: After nine straight weeks at the top, the Wildcats fall after back-to-back losses, making way for the Wolverines.

items.title: Star WR Hill released as Dolphins clean house
items.description: The Dolphins released Tyreek Hill in a flurry of roster moves that will clear significant salary cap space.

items.title: U.S. women blank Sweden, roll into hockey final
items.description: The Americans continued their dominant run through the women's hockey tournament, routing Sweden 5-0 to reach the gold medal game. The U.S. team has o...
